summary: Iteration 9 testing completed successfully. Major portfolio redesign from manual watchlist to 6 autonomous AI-managed portfolios using God Mode 3-LLM consensus. 15/15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with responsive design. 5 of 6 portfolios now active (Value Stocks still constructing by daemon).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: 'ok', service: 'BMIA'}
Backend: GET /api/guidance/stats regression - 1,285 announcements, 264 stocks
Backend: GET /api/market/overview regression - working
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/overview - returns overview of all 6 portfolios (total_capital: 30000000, active: 5/6, pending: 1)
Backend: GET /api/portfolios - returns all portfolios with holdings and strategies dict (6 strategies defined)
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/long_term - returns active portfolio with 10 holdings
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/alpha_generator - returns active portfolio with 10 holdings
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/bespoke_forward_looking - returns active portfolio with 10 holdings
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/invalid_type - returns 404 as expected
Backend: POST /api/portfolios/long_term/refresh-prices - triggers price refresh successfully
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/rebalance-log-all/recent - returns rebalance logs (0 entries - no rebalancing yet)
Backend: GET /api/guidance/pdf/stats - returns PDF extraction stats (1258 with PDF, 122 processed, 121 with text)
Backend: GET /api/signals/alerts - returns signal alerts (0 alerts)
Backend: GET /api/bse/quote/500325 - BSE quote working (LTP=1314.55)
Backend: GET /api/watchlist - returns 404 (old endpoint removed as expected)
Frontend: /watchlist shows 'Autonomous Portfolios' page with correct title
Frontend: Shows 6 portfolio strategy cards in 2-column grid
Frontend: Active portfolios show current value (~₹50L each), P&L%, holdings count (10 stocks)
Frontend: Constructing portfolios show animated spinner with 'Queued for construction'
Frontend: Clicking active portfolio expands to show holdings table
Frontend: Holdings table shows Stock, Entry, Current, Qty, P&L, Weight, Rationale columns
Frontend: Portfolio Thesis section displays at bottom of expanded holdings
Frontend: Global summary shows Total Capital (300L), Current Value (249.7L), P&L, Active (5/6), Constructing (1)
Frontend: Refresh button works and updates data
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Portfolio' nav item
Frontend: Mobile responsive design working with hamburger menu
Regression: Guidance page still works (/guidance) - 1,285 filings, 264 stocks, Ask AI button present
Regression: Market Overview still works (/) - Market Intelligence Cockpit with all data
test_credentials: No auth required. LLM key configured in backend/.env as EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
seed_data_creation: Portfolios are autonomously constructed by the background daemon. Currently 5 of 6 portfolios active with 10 stocks each (~₹50L per portfolio).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 major redesign complete. Old watchlist system removed. New autonomous portfolio system with 6 AI-managed strategies using God Mode 3-LLM consensus. 5 portfolios active (long_term, alpha_generator, bespoke_forward_looking, quick_entry, swing), 1 still constructing (value_stocks). Each portfolio has 10 holdings with ~₹50L invested. PDF extraction daemon running (122 PDFs processed). Rebalancing will occur after market close (4-6 PM IST). All Phase 7-8 features (Guidance, AI RAG) remain functional.

pdf_extraction_stats.details: Inline approach - 1258 filings with PDF, 122 processed, 121 with text, 1136 pending

signal_alerts_endpoint.details: Returns empty array (no signals hit targets recently)

bse_quote_regression.details: BSE quote for Reliance (500325) returns LTP=1314.55
